title: feat(build): unify build system across monorepo
body:
## Summary

This PR unifies the build system across the entire monorepo by standardizing on **Rollup + SWC** for package builds and **Vite** for examples

Related: [FX-3692](https://algolia.atlassian.net/browse/FX-3692)

## Changes

### Build pipeline
- Migrate transpilation from **Babel to SWC** for all packages
- Simplify Babel config to **Jest/Storybook only**
- Introduce shared Rollup configuration (`scripts/build/rollup.base.mjs`, `rollup.plugins.mjs`) to eliminate duplicated build logic across packages
- Rewrite the Babel extension resolver as a Rollup plugin (`rollup-plugin-extension-resolver`) with CJS/ESM support and tests
- Add a Rollup plugin to wrap warnings with `__DEV__` checks (replaces the Babel equivalent)
- Add shared JSX pragma fix plugins and banner generation
- Bump bundlesize thresholds slightly to reflect the new output (negligible deltas)

### Package configs
- Convert all package Rollup configs from `.js` to `.mjs` and refactor them to use the shared base config
- Packages affected: `instantsearch.js`, `react-instantsearch`, `react-instantsearch-core`, `react-instantsearch-nextjs`, `react-instantsearch-router-nextjs`, `vue-instantsearch`, `algolia-experiences`, `algoliasearch-helper`, `instantsearch-ui-components`, `instantsearch-codemods`

### Examples
- Migrate all examples from **Parcel to Vite** (JS, React, Vue)
- Migrate the React SSR example from **Webpack to Vite**
- Add symlinks for UMD example local packages

## Known issues

- Vue SSR example is still not building

## Breaking / Compatibility
- IE11 compatibility unchanged (targets unchanged)
- Build output filenames unchanged

[FX-3692]: https://algolia.atlassian.net/browse/FX-3692?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiNWRkNTljNzYxNjVmNDY3MDlhMDU5Y2ZhYzA5YTRkZjUiLCJwIjoiZ2l0aHViLWNvbS1KU1cifQ
